text: 1g of carbs. and that is basically the whole nutrition story.

pros first: can be a clean hydration tool. especially compared with sugary sports drinks, this is a better functional option. context tells the real story. that is the whole point of misc. use case can matter more than macros. this category is really about function and trade-offs.

the drawbacks next: most people do not need it constantly. useful tool, but not an everyday necessity. not a whole-food nutrition star. most misc items are weak on raw nutrient profile. rarely deserves to be treated as a foundation food. most of these are situational, not core nutrition plays.
B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
